draft:
Subject: RE: FYI: Company holiday next week

Dear [Sender's Name],

Thank you for informing us about the office closure next Monday due to the public holiday. We appreciate the heads-up.

Best regards,

[Your Name]
original_body:
Please note, our office will remain closed next Monday for the public holiday.
Disclaimer: This message contains information which is confidential and protected by copyright and is governed by intellectual property rights of Crisp Analytics Pvt Ltd (Lumiq). The use of the “Lumiq.ai” trademarks without the prior written consent of “Lumiq.ai” is forbidden. If you are not the intended recipient of this message, please delete it and destroy all copies. If you are the intended recipient of this message, you should not disclose or distribute or forward it to third parties without the consent of our company.
